rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE BLANDINA D. PADLAN REVOCABLE TRUST OF 5/16/00 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Re: Petition To Subject Trust To Court Supervision, Remove Trustee, Compel Accounting, And Attorneys Fees Entered 3-14-19
rulings.Rulings: This Motion to Set Aside Order Re: Petition to Subject Trust to Court Supervision, Remove Trustee, Compel Accounting, and Attorney's Fees Entered March 14, 2019 refers to CCP §§ 473(b), 663, and 657. Although the Motion is captioned only as a motion to set aside the March 14, 2019 Order, the Court considers this as a motion for reconsideration. The other cited statutes are inapplicable. Per CCP § 1008, an application to reconsider and modify or vacate an order must be brought within 10 days of service of the order, and be based upon new or different facts, circumstances, or law. Respondent did not comply with any of the forgoing. The Motion is denied. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, June 4, 2019.
